warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Opening of Grand Central Madison on February 27, presenting new travel opportunities for all customers

Historic opening of Grand Central Madison on February 27, 2023, presenting new travel opportunities for all customers. AM Peak service to Manhattan increased by 57%, and Manhattan service was split between Penn Station and Grand Central Madison on an approximately 60/40 basis.
Completion of the Main Line Expansion enabling never-before-seen service flexibility, with a doubling of off-peak service on the Ronkonkoma branch

tool_args.label: Manhattan service split GCM vs Penn

payload.claim_text: Manhattan service was split between Penn Station and Grand Central Madison on an approximately 60/40 basis
payload.subject: LIRR Manhattan service

payload.claim_text: 275 trains that were added to the weekday schedule, bringing us to a total of 943 daily trains, almost 300 of which operated to or from Grand Central Madison
payload.subject: LIRR weekday service

tool_args.label: AM Peak service increase to Manhattan

payload.raw_value_text: AM Peak service to Manhattan increased by 57%
increase in service to Brooklyn of over 30%
Reverse Commute ridership increased +15.7% in the AM period
Reverse Commute ridership increased +25.2% in the PM Peak Period
28% decrease over the past 30 years system-wide total ridership
Non-Commutation ridership showed an increase of 44%
Commutation ridership showed a decrease of 59%

tool_args.label: GCM vs Penn station share approaching 40%

payload.claim_text: Customers will continue taking advantage of the new service options, increasing the share of trips to GCM vs. Penn Station (currently approaching 40% share for trips to GCM vs. 60% share to Penn Station)
payload.subject: GCM share

payload.raw_value_text: weekdays routinely carrying more than 230,000 customers

tool_args.label: South Fork Commuter Connection ridership recovery

payload.raw_value_text: Ridership for the South Fork Commuter Connection continued to rebound and surpass pre-pandemic levels by 56%

tool_args.label: Commutation ridership to western terminals 10yr change

payload.raw_value_text: Commutation ridership to western terminals decreased by 31%
Non-Commutation ridership to western terminals decreased by 13%
Intermediate ridership outside of western terminals decreased by 6%

payload.claim_text: When asking those dissatisfied what would increase their satisfaction, the top 3 areas mentioned were: 'Shorter wait times on the weekdays', 'More reliable service', 'Better fare incentives'
payload.subject: LIRR customer dissatisfaction

payload.claim_text: New business opportunities are expected to bring incremental ridership as local events, such as the 2024 T20 Cricket World Cup hosted at Nassau County and the Copa America soccer games hosted at MetLife stadium in June 2024
payload.subject: 2024 events
